summary: Physics redo successful. Concepts now distribute as pinned hubs across canvas in a 5x4 grid pattern. Thoughts cluster around their connected concepts.
approach: Abandoned physics-only approach. Instead: (1) Pre-compute concept positions in grid pattern with jitter, (2) PIN concepts using fx/fy so they don't move, (3) Position thoughts near their connected concepts, (4) Use minimal physics just for thought collision avoidance.
notes_for_orchestrator: Physics-only approach failed repeatedly because thoughts connecting to multiple concepts pull those concepts together. Solution was to PIN concepts (fx/fy) so they CANNOT move, only thoughts move. Grid spacing may need tuning for different viewport sizes. zoomToFit handles edge-to-edge but padding value (10) might need adjustment.
